subject: FW: Two things from Peter Diamandis
body:
From: Peter Diamandis [mailto:peter@xprize.org] 
Sent: Monday, May 12, 2008 1:44 PM
To: Lesley Groff; Jayc@Emcionline.Com; Sarah Johnston
Subject: Two things from Peter Diamandis

 

Hi Leslie-

I just finished a call with Jeffery.

Two things: 

(1) He invited me to visit with him in the 2nd / 3rd week of June at his
ranch in New Mexico.  Once you have proposed dates, please coordinate
with Sarah Johnston, copied above.

(2) I introduced Jeffrey to my good friend Jay Coleman who runs a
company called Hedge that I believe Jeffery would be very interested in
learning about.  Jeffrey has agreed to take Jay's call.  I've given Jay
your tel #: 212-750-9895 and ask him to give you a call to coordinate.

Best,

Peter
body_html:
From: Peter Diamandis [mailto:peter@xprize.org]
Sent: Monday, May 12, 2008 1:44 PM
To: Lesley Groff; Jayc@Emcionline.Com; Sarah Johnston
Subject: Two things from Peter Diamandis

 

Hi Leslie-

I just finished a call with Jeffery.

Two things:

(1) He invited me to visit with him in the 2nd / 3rd week of June at his ranch in New Mexico.  Once you have proposed dates, please coordinate with Sarah Johnston, copied above.

(2) I introduced Jeffrey to my good friend Jay Coleman who runs a company called Hedge that I believe Jeffery would be very interested in learning about.  Jeffrey has agreed to take Jay’s call.  I’ve given Jay your tel #: 212-750-9895 and ask him to give you a call to coordinate.

Best,

Peter
